summary: User requested implementation of an alert system for duplicate charges, interest fees, late fees, and other suspicious charges. No implementation details, code, or decisions were provided in the conversation exchange. This appears to be the initial feature request without subsequent discussion of approach, scope, or technical decisions. Open items include defining what constitutes "suspicious" charges, alert triggering logic, notification method, and implementation timeline.
